programme.title: History Documentary
programme.desc: H2 provides history and science documentaries exploring past events, innovations, and real-world mysteries.

programme.title: America'S War On Drugs
programme.desc: (MA) Cocaine lands in America from secret airports, lining the pockets of violent cartel bosses, as the CIA's shadow wars have unintended consequences. Crack invades the USA.

programme.title: The Toys That Built The World
programme.desc: (PG) After passing on the biggest deal in toy industry history, Mattel President Ray Wagner finds himself a step behind former colleague-turned-rival, Bernie Loomis.

programme.title: The Engineering That Built The World
programme.desc: H2 provides history and science documentaries exploring past events, innovations, and real-world mysteries.
